title: Crunchy Umami Peruvian Apricot Stir-fry
description: A show-off Peruvian dish featuring apricot jam in a dairy-free and crunchy stir-fry with umami-rich seasonings.
instructions: Warm sesame seeds in a dry pan until fragrant and lightly golden, then set aside.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves; stir-fry for about 30 seconds until softened but not browned.
Add apricot jam to the pan. Let it cook for about 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened and fragrant.
Gradually add water chestnuts, snow peas, shredded kale, and chopped basil leaves; stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until all vegetables are tender yet crisp.
Sprinkle soy sauce over the mixture to create a tadka (simmering glaze). Stir well to combine with ingredients. Let cook for about 1 minute more to allow flavors to meld together.
Add red chili powder and mix quickly to ensure spices aren't burnt. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with the toasted sesame seeds.
